item.description:
# N1KO-STATE v1.0.14
**Settings polish & dashboard fixes** — unified pill-style controls, desktop battery handling, gauge alignment, and a scrollable settings layout that no longer clips content.
**设置页打磨与仪表盘修复** — 统一药丸式选项、桌面机电池逻辑、仪表盘对齐，以及可滚动、不再裁切内容的设置布局。
---
## Download / 下载
| Asset | Description | |-------|-------------| | **N1KO-STATE.dmg** | Universal binary (Apple Silicon + Intel). Drag to Applications. | | **N1KO-STATE-sparkle.zip** | In-app updater archive used by Sparkle. Normal manual installs should use the DMG. | | **appcast.xml** | Sparkle update feed for automatic update checks. |
**Install note:** If macOS blocks the ad-hoc signed app on first launch, run `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app` in Terminal. You can also right-click **N1KO-STATE.app** -> **Open** on first launch.
**安装说明：** 如果首次打开被 macOS 拦截，优先在「终端」执行 `xattr -cr /Applications/N1KO-STATE.app`。也可以右键 **N1KO-STATE.app** -> **打开**（仅首次需要）。
---
## What's New / 本版本内容
### Settings UI / 设置界面
- Replaced segmented controls with in-card pill selectors on Menu Bar, Popover, Sampling, and Advanced pages. - Menu Bar page layout: Metrics + Live Preview side by side, Appearance full width below. - Settings window is resizable (default 980×720), with a properly constrained scroll area so bottom controls are never clipped.
- 菜单栏、弹窗、采样、高级等页的分段控件改为卡片内药丸式选项。 - 菜单栏页改为「指标 | 预览」并排，「外观」整行置于下方。 - 设置窗口支持调整大小（默认 980×720），内容区可滚动，底部不再被裁切。
### Battery on Desktops / 桌面机电池
- Macs without a battery now disable the battery toggle with an explanation instead of showing a misleading ON state. - App startup reconciles saved battery preferences when no power source is present.
- 无电池的 Mac 会禁用电池开关并显示说明，避免开关打开却不显示。 - 启动时自动校正已保存的电池相关设置。
### Gauges Popover / 仪表盘弹窗
- Equal-width two-column grid with leading alignment. - Header summary pills and ring gauges align with card content. - Fixed popover header layout regression.
- 等宽双列网格、左对齐布局。 - 表头摘要与环形图与卡片内容对齐。 - 修复弹窗表头布局问题。
### Versioning / 版本同步
- Updated app version metadata to `1.0.14` / build `114`.
- 应用版本元数据更新为 `1.0.14` / build `114`。
---
## Full changelog / 完整变更
**Full changelog:** [v1.0.14 tag](https://github.com/baogutang/N1KO-STATE/releases/tag/v1.0.14)
